title: OIM response to UK Internal Market Act consultation
body: "23 January 2025: DBT launched a consultation seeking views on the operation of certain aspects of the UK Internal Market Act 2020, in particular Parts 1 to 4 of the Act.  31 March 2025: The OIM has responded to this consultation, drawing on evidence from its experience of discharging its functions under Part 4 of the Act. "
